name: Manassas VA, USA

rent.notes: Independent city + Prince William County surround. Historic downtown. ~32% cheaper than Fairfax.

groceries.notes: Giant, Wegmans, Harris Teeter. ~10% below Fairfax averages.

utilities.notes: NOVEC electric + Washington Gas + City of Manassas water/sewer.

healthcare.notes: Medicare baseline. Novant UVA Health System Prince William (Haymarket) 10 min, Sentara Northern Virginia Medical Center in Manassas.

transportation.notes: VRE (Virginia Railway Express) Manassas line to DC (~60 min). Interstate 66 to DC ~1hr in traffic. Higher fuel use than inner Northern Virginia (NOVA).

entertainment.notes: Manassas National Battlefield Park, historic downtown. Cable+1Gig typical.

miscellaneous.notes: HOA (homeowners association) in subdivisions, Interstate 66 Express Lanes tolls, Prince William County (PWC) vehicle decal.

medicalOOP.notes: Same retiree profile. Specialty care may require trip to Fairfax/DC.

taxes.notes: Income tax computed from VA brackets.

healthcarePreMedicare.notes: ACA silver benchmark for 2-adult household both age ~60, before subsidies. County-level estimate (Prince William County, VA). Prince William County (PWC) marketplace — slightly cheaper than Fairfax. Estimated ±15% vs healthcare.gov quote — verify for a specific ZIP before relying on the number.

stateIncomeTax.exemptions: Age 65+ deduction $12K/person. SS fully exempt from VA tax.

salesTax.notes: Prince William County / City of Manassas 6% (4.3% state + 0.7% regional + 1% Northern Virginia (NOVA) transit)

propertyTax.notes: Renters: no direct property tax. Prince William County (PWC) vehicle personal property ~$3.70/$100 assessed — slightly below Fairfax.

taxes.notes: VA tax treatment same as Fairfax; lower Prince William County (PWC) property tax rate.

healthcare.notes: Novant UVA Health Prince William (Haymarket) + Sentara Northern Virginia (NOVA) Medical Center. Inova Fair Oaks ~25 min for specialty.

acaMarketplace.notes: Prince William County (PWC) marketplace — similar to Fairfax with slightly more competition.
acaMarketplace.disclaimer: Estimated ±15% vs healthcare.gov quote — verify for a specific ZIP before relying on the number.

lifestyle.notes: Manassas National Battlefield Park, historic Old Town Manassas, Bull Run Mountains. Strong Latino community. Quieter suburban/small-city feel.

pros: ~32% cheaper rent than Fairfax — biggest price drop within 30 miles
Same VA tax treatment (Social Security exempt, 65+ deduction)
Lower Prince William County (PWC) vehicle tax rate
VRE (Virginia Railway Express) Manassas line to DC
Historic Old Town Manassas walkable downtown
Novant UVA Health + Sentara hospitals in town
cons: Fewer dining/cultural options than inner Northern Virginia
Specialty healthcare may require Fairfax/DC trip
Interstate 66 + VRE (Virginia Railway Express) traffic/crowding at peak
